# Amity Immigration Services

> Registered migration agent (MARN 964861) based in Bundoora, Melbourne. General Australian visa information and consultation enquiries — not a law firm, and not legal advice.

## About
Amity Immigration Services helps individuals, families, and employers explore skilled, employer-sponsored, family, student, business, and visitor visa pathways across Victoria. The registered agent you meet is the one who prepares and lodges your matter.

## Key pages
- [Home](/): Overview of services and visa streams
- [About](/about): Firm story, team, and credentials
- [Services](/services): Migration service listings
- [Visa sub-classes](/services/visa-sub-classes): Directory of published Australian visa subclasses by stream
- [Points calculator](/services/points-calculator): Indicative GSM points estimate (verify with the Department of Home Affairs)
- [Resources](/resources): Guides and official Home Affairs links
- [Blog](/blog): Insights on visas and migration pathways
- [Contact](/contact): Enquiry form and Bundoora office details
- [Privacy](/legal/privacy) and [Terms](/legal/terms)

## Contact
- Address: 59 Settlement Road, Bundoora VIC 3083, Australia
- Area served: Melbourne and Victoria

## Important
Visa criteria change. Always verify current requirements with the Department of Home Affairs (https://immi.homeaffairs.gov.au/) and seek advice from a registered migration agent about your circumstances. This site provides general information only.
